_comment: 示例二：用另一份配置训练另一个独立模型 / Example 2: use another config to train another independent model

experiment._comment: model_2 会自动写入 datasets/model_2、runs/model_2 和 artifacts/model_2 / model_2 automatically writes to datasets/model_2, runs/model_2 and artifacts/model_2
experiment.name: model_2
experiment._comment_languages: 本例只训练英法西葡四种语言 / This example trains English, French, Spanish and Portuguese only

initialization._comment: 从零训练第二个模型 / Start the second model from scratch

generation._comment: 复用公共文本 CSV，但只生成 languages 中启用的语言 / Reuse the common text CSV but generate only enabled languages

voice._comment: 为 model_2 设计与 model_1 不同的音色 / Design a voice distinct from model_1
voice._comment_id: 不同的音色描述应使用不同 id / A different voice design should use a different id
voice.speaker: voice_01
voice.prompt: A confident, expressive adult voice with a slightly lower pitch, crisp articulation, and natural pacing.
voice.reference_text: This reference creates the second independently trained multilingual model.

training._comment: 每个模型可以使用不同训练参数和随机种子 / Each model may use different training settings and random seed
